reviews.comment:
En lo particular mala experiencias ...no es para nada recomendable...mala atención del encargado de playa y la atención del Buffet pésima..

(Translated by Google)
Personally, I had a bad experience...not at all recommended...poor service from the beach attendant and terrible buffet service.
